title: systests: manifest-zstd: clean up
body:
Followup to #20016:
- remove obsolete (misleading) comment
- prune dangling <none>:<none> image

Also, in kube test, rmi pause_image to avoid nasty red warnings

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Re-pushed with one more fix, a giant **DUH** that I introduced in #19878.
